Notes.Text:
This update for editorconfig-core-c fixes the following issue:

- CVE-2026-40489: improper use of `strcpy` can lead to a stack buffer overflow (bsc#1262131).
Notes.Title: Details

Notes.Title: Terms of Use

Relationships.RelatesToProductReference: SUSE Linux Enterprise Module for Development Tools 15 SP7

Vulnerabilities.Description: editorconfig-core-c  is an EditorConfig core library for use by plugins supporting EditorConfig parsing. Versions up to and including 0.12.10 have a stack-based buffer overflow in ec_glob() that allows an attacker to crash any application using libeditorconfig by providing a specially crafted directory structure and .editorconfig file. This is an incomplete fix for CVE-2023-0341. The pcre_str buffer was protected in 0.12.6 but the adjacent l_pattern[8194] stack buffer received no equivalent protection. On Ubuntu 24.04, FORTIFY_SOURCE converts the overflow to SIGABRT (DoS). Version 0.12.11 contains an updated fix.

ProductID: SUSE Linux Enterprise Module for Development Tools 15 SP7:libeditorconfig0-0.12.6-150600.3.6.1
